title: 250x Safety Pins Assorted 4-Sizes - Strong Nickel Plated Steel, Rust Resistant - Small Safety Pins for Clothes and Ideal for Art & Crafts, DIY, Pinning, Hemming, Dressmaking, Sewing and More
features: 【Assorteded Safety Pin Pack】 Our pack includes 250 durable safety pins in 4 different sizes: 40 pins of 3.7cm (1.47"), 60 pins of 2.7cm (1.06"), 100 pins of 2.2cm (0.87"), and 50 pins of 1.9cmcm (0.75"), Our pack ensures you have the right size of safety pin for any task you need to complete

【Designed with Your Safety in Mind】 ProPinz safety pins are available in both small and large sizes and designed with your safety in mind. The safety pin clasp prevents sharp marks and pricks that could harm your fingers while allowing you to easily complete small tasks and get creative

【Strong and Durable】Our safety pins are designed with durability in mind, made of high-grade steel with a nickel finish to resist rust and corrosion. The sharp needles easily penetrate any fabric, making it convenient for a variety of tasks

【High-Quality and Rust-Resistant】 Our safety pins are made of high-quality nickel-plated steel, ensuring durability and rust-resistance for long-lasting use. The sleek design of the pins of elegance to your projects and attire

【Perfect Gift for Everyone】These baby safety pins with backs make an excellent gift for crafters, travelers, artists, parents, or anyone who appreciates versatile and safe tools for stitching, patching, quilting, clothing, and around-the-house projects.
description: Product Description Product specifications Pack Includes: 250 Safety Pins Assorted Sizes Material: Nickel Plated Steel 3.7 cm Pins = 40 Pieces 2.7 cm Pins = 60 Pieces 2.2 cm Pins = 90 Pieces 1.9 cm Pins = 60 Pieces ProPinz: Sharp and Sturdy Safety Pins with Different Sizes in One Pack Sharp and Sturdy ProPinz safety pins are made of nickel-plated steel that resists bending and rusting, ensuring their durability and reliability. Even if you accidentally leave a safety pin stuck in your shirt or pants, it will remain the same sparkling silver shade. These saree pins have sharp ends that can penetrate any fabric, no matter how dense it is. One pack of ProPinz safety pins for clothes invisible includes four different sizes: 1.9cm(60Pcs), 2.2 cm(90Pcs), 2.7 cm(60Pcs), and 3.7 cm(40Pcs). You can find them all in a sturdy storage box with lid and partitions, making it easy to locate your desired size without any hassle. You can also pack them in your bag and carry them with you conveniently wherever you go. This pack offers versatile options, giving you your money’s worth. Durable and Reliable Sharp and Sturdy Different Sizes Available Convenient Storage Box Rust-Resistant Material Penetrates Dense Fabric Nickle Plated Steel Our pins are now fortified with premium nickel-plated steel, ensuring unbeatable durability. Sharp Pin Point With a sharp and precise pin point, our safety pins can penetrate any fabric with ease. Sleek & Strong Sleek yet strong, our safety pins are designed to withstand daily wear and tear. Rust Resistance Crafted for longevity, our safety pins are built to resist rust and corrosion.
